query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(rd.date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS total_dates,
  COUNT(rdd.id) AS decided
FROM request_dates rd
JOIN vacation_requests vr ON vr.id = rd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = vr.employee_id
LEFT JOIN request_date_decisions rdd ON rdd.request_id = rd.request_id AND rdd.date = rd.date
WHERE vr.status NOT IN ('withdrawn', 'draft')
  AND e.is_active = 1
  AND (e.role IS NULL OR e.role != 'ancillary')
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;
